problem_restatement: Ship a pumped-fn-native session frame with explicit graph dependencies, structured lifetimes, provider adapters, and a production-grade issue-triage proof while preserving every standing anti-goal.
inbound_signal: The final independent reviewer rechecked the previously rejected production paths and returned GO with zero release blockers after the fixes and deterministic replay.
decision_delta: Preserved the late discovery, fixed canonical model-tag identity, paginated marker recovery, moved repository HEAD before lease claim, made stale rejection idempotent, bounded publication HTTP time under the database fence, and made Promise lint resolution lexical.
evidence_delta: Objective is 16 of 16. Lite is 223 of 223, SDK core is 54 of 54 excluding the managed package-export child-process harness, issue-triage is 11 of 11, providers and supporting SDK suites pass, root lint is 112 files with zero diagnostics, and alignment has zero gaps.
dkr_decision: Accept the final implementation and independent review evidence, terminalize the run, and update PR 346 without release or merge.
expected_effect: One traceable session and agent model, one ordinary tag mechanism, controlled tool composition, joined cleanup and cancellation, and a replayable production triage example.
